workflow_id.description: Required. The Temporal workflow_id to query.

run_id.description: Optional. Specific run_id of the workflow execution. When omitted, the server targets the latest run.

query_name.description: Required. The name of the query handler registered via workflow.SetQueryHandler in the target workflow.

args.description: Optional positional args passed to the query handler. Omit (or send an empty array) when the handler takes no arguments.
